signals: Issue Description: Unable to log into Oracle Financials.

issue_details.description: Since 9:00 AM IST, Priya Mehta and three Accounts Payable team members cannot log into Oracle Financials, receiving an ORA-01017 error. This blocks invoice processing and payment runs, risking ₹1.8 crore in delayed payments. The issue is suspected to be due to an unsynced Oracle LDAP connector after an AD password rotation.

resolution.root_cause: Oracle LDAP connector sync job failed silently after AD rotation.
resolution.resolution_notes: Platform Engineering manually re-triggered LDAP sync, resolving the login issue. All affected users confirmed access. A post-mortem is scheduled, and LDAP sync monitoring alerts will be added.

summary: This support ticket, submitted by Priya Mehta on July 15, 2024, involves a critical access issue with the Oracle Financials ERP system affecting the Accounts Payable team at Acme Corporation. The problem, caused by a failed Oracle LDAP connector sync after an Active Directory password rotation, risked delaying ₹1.8 crore in payments. The issue was resolved by Vikram Nair from the Platform Engineering Team in 1 hour and 33 minutes by manually re-triggering the LDAP sync, and all affected users regained access.
